## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / build / tooling change

## Testing Performed

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. Include relevant command output where helpful. -->

- [ ] Unit tests: `go test ./...`
- [ ] Integration tests: `make ictest-*`
- [ ] Manual testing (describe steps below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behaviour
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable
- [ ] `golangci-lint` passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] No breaking consensus change introduced without prior coordination (upgrade handler, governance proposal, etc.)
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
